nl_query: Show the complete moderation audit trail for each script that received moderation: the rule type, parameters, original total, adjusted total, mark difference, and the name of the COE user who applied it, ordered by application date.
failed_sql:
SELECT mr.rule_type, mr.parameters, ma.original_total, ma.adjusted_total, (ma.adjusted_total - ma.original_total) AS mark_difference, au.display_name AS coe_app_user_name, ma.applied_at
FROM   moderation_application ma
JOIN   moderation_rule        mr ON mr.id = ma.moderation_rule_id
JOIN   app_user            au ON au.id = ma.applied_by
WHERE  ma.script_id IN (
  SELECT script_id
  FROM   evaluation_attempt
  WHERE  is_active = TRUE
)
ORDER  BY ma.applied_at;
error: Validation failed (schema): Column validation failed: moderation_application does NOT have rule_type. rule_type is on moderation_rule. Join: moderation_rule mr ON mr.id = ma.moderation_rule_id.
